activities_projects.title: Atmosphere Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the atmosphere at Pashupatinath temple
steps: Read the paragraph describing Pashupatinath
Identify different activities happening there
Write a paragraph explaining the chaotic atmosphere

activities_projects.title: Contrast Study
activities_projects.objective: Compare the atmosphere of Pashupatinath and Baudhnath
steps: Read the descriptions of both temples
List differences in atmosphere, people and surroundings
Write a comparison paragraph

activities_projects.title: Imagery Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify visual imagery used in the prose
steps: Find three examples of visual imagery
Explain how they help the reader imagine the scene

activities_projects.title: Sound Imagery Analysis
steps: Identify sounds mentioned in the busy streets
Explain their role in creating the scene

activities_projects.title: Character Analysis of the Flute Seller
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the personality of the flute seller
steps: Read the paragraph describing the flute seller
Write 6–7 lines analysing his character

activities_projects.title: Symbolism of the Flute
activities_projects.objective: Understand symbolic meaning of the flute
steps: Think about the significance of flute music
Write a paragraph explaining its symbolic meaning

activities_projects.title: Author’s Travel Reflection
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the author’s feelings about travel
steps: Read the final part of the lesson
Write how the author feels about returning home

activities_projects.title: Cultural Diversity Study
steps: Identify cultural and religious elements described
Explain how they reflect diversity

activities_projects.title: Theme Interpretation
activities_projects.objective: Interpret the theme of the lesson
steps: Think about the author's observations
Write a paragraph explaining the theme

activities_projects.title: Critical Reflection
steps: Explain what the author learns from his experience
Write your opinion about the lesson
